MOON'S STATES AND CONSTELLATIONS 55
Mula .—Learned, happy, rich, sickly, handsome, of thievish
leanings, of vacillating mind, eldest of the family, and a king.
P. Asddha :—Of firm friendship, humble, with many children,
leader of men, wise, eater of sumptuous food, faithful to his
wife, and beloved of the king.
U. Asddha :—Fond of mirth, modest, having many enemies,
distressed, possessed of superior intellect, wanderer, with many-
wives, and kind.
Svavana :~Learned, living away from birth-place, with an
excellent wife, rich, famous, with tew children, and many foes,
spending lavishly, happy and lordly.
Dhanistha '—Rich, heroic, charitable, bereaved of his wife,
happy in alien lands, talkative, untruthful and fond of music
and dance.
Satahhisak :—Voluble, deceitful, in servitude, without sons
and brothers, rich, fickle-minded, miserly, engaged in playing
